promo.title: Welcome to VILAVI restaurant!
promo.subTitle: Greetings on the shores of pleasure: Open the doors to a world of refined gastronomy and unrivaled comfort.

carp.title: Carp on Coals
carp.description: Connoisseurs of grilled carp on the barbecue will appreciate it.

pork-shank.title: Country-style Pork Knuckle
pork-shank.description: Pork knuckle baked in the oven in a rustic style. Served with crispy onion rings and delicious creamy sauce.

borsch.title: Borscht
borsch.description: Borscht according to the recipe of the best grandmother. Served with sour cream, herbs, homemade bacon, black bread, and garlic.

caesar.title: Caesar Salad
caesar.description: Classic Caesar salad with chicken. You can replace chicken with salmon, shrimp, or bacon according to your taste. We cater to every preference.

bear-plate.title: Beer Plate
bear-plate.description: Fantastic snack not only with beer but also while waiting for your main dishes with family. Everyone will find something to their taste for their taste buds.

cheesecake.title: Cheesecake
cheesecake.description: After a hearty lunch, it's time for dessert. Our delightful cheesecake with chocolate sauce will be the perfect finale to your meal.

about-us.title: History of Cafe VILAVI
about-us.p-1: The history of cafe VILAVI begins in 2007.
about-us.p-2: The special atmosphere of our cafe is given by its location.
about-us.p-3: Cafe VILAVI is located in Riga in the very center of Mežciems district: the district is surrounded by forests and lakes. Forest paths and the Bikernieki highway will help you work up an appetite. The cozy atmosphere will allow you to relax and enjoy a variety of dishes, drinks and aromatic kebab both in the halls and on the summer veranda all year round.
about-us.p-4: For more than 10 years the cafe has been pleasing its guests with some of the best kebabs in Riga, as well as a wide range of hot fish and meat dishes.
about-us.p-5: On weekdays you can have an inexpensive and very tasty lunch here.
about-us.p-6: We appreciate each of our guests and adhere to our core values: excellent service, delicious food, affordable prices and cozy atmosphere!
about-us.p-7: Dear friends, we look forward to welcoming you all year round!
